top_signals.title: UK Sets January 2027 Deadline for Ban on Fuel Made From Russian Crude
top_signals.summary: The UK has finally put a date on the sanctions loophole it said it would close a while ago. The British government said Friday that imports of diesel and jet fuel refined from Russian crude in third countries will be banned no later than January 1, 2027, closing one of the remaining routes by which Russian oil products can still find their way into the UK market. The move builds on sanctions announced in May that prohibit the import of refined oil made from Russian crude, even if that refining occurred outside Russia. At the time, however, London…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Turkey’s Quiet Realignment
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Netherlands Seizes 800 Servers, Arrests 2 for Aiding Cyberattacks
top_signals.summary: Authorities in the Netherlands have arrested the co-owners of two related Internet hosting companies for operating IT infrastructure used by Russia to carry out cyberattacks, influence operations and disinformation campaigns inside the European Union. The two men were the focus of a 2025 KrebsOnSecurity story about how their hosting companies had assumed control over the technical infrastructure of Stark Industries Solutions, an Internet service provider sanctioned last year by the EU as a frequent staging ground for cyber mischief from Russia's intelligence agencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Fault Lines in China’s Power
top_signals.summary: America must build—and use—leverage against Beijing.

top_signals.title: The End of the Open Internet
top_signals.summary: Europe lost the plot on online speech.

top_signals.title: Bankruptcy admin approves settlement fund of $47 million for 23andMe data breach victims
top_signals.summary: About 7 million customers of the genetics testing company had their data stolen by hackers starting in April 2023, and many had their information posted on the dark web.

top_signals.title: Major US surveillance program poised to lapse after legislative deadlock
top_signals.summary: It is the first lapse of the spy program, known as Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA), since it was passed into law in 2008.
